query:
SELECT
                bb.id,
                bb.payout_queue_id,
                bbws.batch_cancel_ledger_tx_id as "ledger_id?",
                bbws.batch_created_ledger_tx_id
            FROM bria_batches bb
            INNER JOIN bria_batch_wallet_summaries bbws ON bb.id = bbws.batch_id
            WHERE bb.id = $1
            FOR UPDATE OF bbws
